meaning: n.丹佛(美国科罗拉多州首府)
examples: In Denver late-night taxis are elusive and far from cheap.
Denver is the gateway to some of the best skiing in the world.
His company recently constructed an office building in downtown Denver.
Most recently, his flagship Denver Post was victorious in a long-running war with E.
Frontier Airlines has grabbed nearly 20% of domestic traffic in Denver, a United hub.
